{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Manager (Health Institutions Hygiene Solutions)",
  "description": "HYT Consulting - We are a professional service firm into the business of Recruitment, Talent Development, HR Outsourcing and Consultation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager (Health Institutions Hygiene Solutions)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within hospitals, laboratories, dental clinics, maternity clinics, diagnostic centres and related healthcare institutions across Lagos State.
	Promote hygiene and sanitation solutions that improve infection control, safety and operational efficiency within institutional environments.
	Build strong relationships with procurement managers, clinicians, infection control teams, laboratory managers, pharmacists and facility managers.
	Conduct presentations, product demonstrations and onboarding sessions for institutional stakeholders.
	Develop and manage a strong sales pipeline to achieve revenue targets within Lagos.
	Increase product visibility and adoption across healthcare institutions in Lagos State.
	Support institutional customers through both direct engagement and digital ordering channels where applicable.
	Gather market intelligence on customer needs, procurement cycles and competitor activities within Lagos.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth order fulfilment and high levels of customer satisfaction.
	Maintain consistent follow-up processes to encourage repeat orders and long-term client relationships.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Biological Sciences, Microbiology, Chemistry, Medical Laboratory Science, Public Health, Pharmacy or related discipline preferred.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in institutional or B2B sales, preferably within healthcare, laboratory, hygiene or related sectors.
	Strong understanding of the Lagos healthcare environment and institutional procurement processes.
	Proven experience selling to hospitals, laboratories, clinics or similar environments.
	Experience as a hospital representative will be an added advantage.
	Good understanding of digital tools and e-commerce channels.
	Strong presentation, negotiation and relationship management skills.
	Ability to work independently and deliver results in a target-driven environment.
	Strong commercial awareness and ability to identify growth opportunities.
	Willingness to travel nationwide as required.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;rajanaku@hytng.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Only qualified candidate will be shortlisted and contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-17",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "HYT Consulting"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

Business Development Manager (Health Institutions Hygiene Solutions) Job at HYT Consulting




        
    

        
        HYT Consulting - We are a professional service firm into the business of Recruitment, Talent Development, HR Outsourcing and Consultation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager (Health Institutions Hygiene Solutions)

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and develop new business opportunities within hospitals, laboratories, dental clinics, maternity clinics, diagnostic centres and related healthcare institutions across Lagos State.
	Promote hygiene and sanitation solutions that improve infection control, safety and operational efficiency within institutional environments.
	Build strong relationships with procurement managers, clinicians, infection control teams, laboratory managers, pharmacists and facility managers.
	Conduct presentations, product demonstrations and onboarding sessions for institutional stakeholders.
	Develop and manage a strong sales pipeline to achieve revenue targets within Lagos.
	Increase product visibility and adoption across healthcare institutions in Lagos State.
	Support institutional customers through both direct engagement and digital ordering channels where applicable.
	Gather market intelligence on customer needs, procurement cycles and competitor activities within Lagos.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth order fulfilment and high levels of customer satisfaction.
	Maintain consistent follow-up processes to encourage repeat orders and long-term client relationships.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Biological Sciences, Microbiology, Chemistry, Medical Laboratory Science, Public Health, Pharmacy or related discipline preferred.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in institutional or B2B sales, preferably within healthcare, laboratory, hygiene or related sectors.
	Strong understanding of the Lagos healthcare environment and institutional procurement processes.
	Proven experience selling to hospitals, laboratories, clinics or similar environments.
	Experience as a hospital representative will be an added advantage.
	Good understanding of digital tools and e-commerce channels.
	Strong presentation, negotiation and relationship management skills.
	Ability to work independently and deliver results in a target-driven environment.
	Strong commercial awareness and ability to identify growth opportunities.
	Willingness to travel nationwide as required.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidate will be shortlisted and contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Assistant",
  "description": "Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.


Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today&rsquo;s dynamic and diverse market.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Job Summary


	We are looking for a zealous Marketing Assistant to support the Marketing department of our company in its primary and administrative duties.


Responsibilities


	Undertake daily administrative tasks to ensure the functionality and coordination of the department&rsquo;s activities
	Support marketing executives in organizing various projects
	Conduct market research and analyze consumer rating reports/ questionnaires
	Employ marketing analytics techniques to gather important data (social media, web analytics, rankings etc.)
	Update spreadsheets, databases and inventories with statistical, financial and non-financial information
	Assist in the organizing of promotional events and traditional or digital campaigns and attend them to facilitate their success
	Prepare and deliver promotional presentations
	Compose and post online content on the company&rsquo;s website and social media accounts
	Write marketing literature (brochures, press releases etc) to augment the company&rsquo;s presence in the market
	Communicate directly with clients and encourage trusting relationships


Requirements


	Good understanding of office management and marketing principles
	Demonstrable ability to multi-task and adhere to deadlines
	Well-organized with a customer-oriented approach
	Good knowledge of market research techniques and databases
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office, marketing computer software and online applications (CRM tools, Online analytics, Google Adwords etc.)
	Exquisite communication and people skills
	High School diploma; BSc in Marketing, Business or relevant field is a strong advantage




Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.



Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to:&nbsp;nikemfollimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Marketing Assistant Job at Nikemfol




        
    

        
        Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.


Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today’s dynamic and diverse market.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    





We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Assistant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Job Summary


	We are looking for a zealous Marketing Assistant to support the Marketing department of our company in its primary and administrative duties.


Responsibilities


	Undertake daily administrative tasks to ensure the functionality and coordination of the department’s activities
	Support marketing executives in organizing various projects
	Conduct market research and analyze consumer rating reports/ questionnaires
	Employ marketing analytics techniques to gather important data (social media, web analytics, rankings etc.)
	Update spreadsheets, databases and inventories with statistical, financial and non-financial information
	Assist in the organizing of promotional events and traditional or digital campaigns and attend them to facilitate their success
	Prepare and deliver promotional presentations
	Compose and post online content on the company’s website and social media accounts
	Write marketing literature (brochures, press releases etc) to augment the company’s presence in the market
	Communicate directly with clients and encourage trusting relationships


Requirements


	Good understanding of office management and marketing principles
	Demonstrable ability to multi-task and adhere to deadlines
	Well-organized with a customer-oriented approach
	Good knowledge of market research techniques and databases
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office, marketing computer software and online applications (CRM tools, Online analytics, Google Adwords etc.)
	Exquisite communication and people skills
	High School diploma; BSc in Marketing, Business or relevant field is a strong advantage




Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.



Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Head of Civil Engineering",
  "description": "DET Consulting &amp; Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals.

Our mission is simple: Empowering people, transforming businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Civil Engineering

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Managing Director (MD)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Head of Civil Engineering to lead and manage all civil engineering projects within the organization.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing project planning, design, execution, and delivery while ensuring quality, safety, and cost efficiency.
	This role requires a strong technical background, leadership capability, and the ability to manage multiple construction projects within timelines and budget.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and oversee all civil engineering projects from concept to completion.
	Develop project plans, timelines, and budgets in alignment with organizational objectives.
	Supervise site activities to ensure projects are executed according to specifications and standards.
	Manage and coordinate engineers, contractors, and site personnel.
	Ensure compliance with engineering standards, building regulations, and safety requirements.
	Review and approve engineering designs, drawings, and technical documentation.
	Monitor project progress, identify risks, and implement corrective actions when necessary.
	Ensure efficient utilization of materials, equipment, and human resources.
	Liaise with clients, consultants, and regulatory authorities on project-related matters.
	Oversee quality control processes to ensure high construction standards.
	Prepare project reports, progress updates, and performance evaluations for management.
	Drive continuous improvement in engineering processes and project execution.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering or a related field.
	Minimum of 5&ndash;7 years of relevant experience in civil engineering and construction.
	Professional certification (e.g., COREN) is an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of construction methods, materials, and engineering principles.
	Proven experience managing multiple construction projects simultaneously.
	Strong leadership and team management skills.
	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD and other design tools.
	Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet project deadlines.


Salary
N500,000 - N600,000 Monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Head of Civil Engineering Job at DET Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        DET Consulting & Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals.

Our mission is simple: Empowering people, transforming businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Civil Engineering

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Managing Director (MD)

Job Summary

	We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Head of Civil Engineering to lead and manage all civil engineering projects within the organization.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing project planning, design, execution, and delivery while ensuring quality, safety, and cost efficiency.
	This role requires a strong technical background, leadership capability, and the ability to manage multiple construction projects within timelines and budget.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and oversee all civil engineering projects from concept to completion.
	Develop project plans, timelines, and budgets in alignment with organizational objectives.
	Supervise site activities to ensure projects are executed according to specifications and standards.
	Manage and coordinate engineers, contractors, and site personnel.
	Ensure compliance with engineering standards, building regulations, and safety requirements.
	Review and approve engineering designs, drawings, and technical documentation.
	Monitor project progress, identify risks, and implement corrective actions when necessary.
	Ensure efficient utilization of materials, equipment, and human resources.
	Liaise with clients, consultants, and regulatory authorities on project-related matters.
	Oversee quality control processes to ensure high construction standards.
	Prepare project reports, progress updates, and performance evaluations for management.
	Drive continuous improvement in engineering processes and project execution.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or a related field.
	Minimum of 5–7 years of relevant experience in civil engineering and construction.
	Professional certification (e.g., COREN) is an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of construction methods, materials, and engineering principles.
	Proven experience managing multiple construction projects simultaneously.
	Strong leadership and team management skills.
	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD and other design tools.
	Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet project deadlines.

N500,000 - N600,000 Monthly.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Acquisition Agent",
  "description": "&nbsp;


?LifeBank is a technology company that powers hospitals and care centers to deliver quality healthcare to patients in emerging markets. The company&rsquo;s technology, infrastructure, agile production, and distribution networks enable hospitals in emerging markets to catch up with their global peers. The company has distributed 45,000+ medical products to 1000+ healthcare facilities, saving 18,000+ lives across Nigeria, Ethiopia and Kenya. At LifeBank, we are the technology-led healthcare system for the future.
We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Acquisition Agent

Job Location:&nbsp;Onipanu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Growth / Sales / Customer Acquisition
Reports to:&nbsp;Director, Customer Health &amp;Acquisition

Role Summary

LifeBank is a technology company that powers hospitals and care centers to deliver quality healthcare to patients in emerging markets. The company&rsquo;s technology, infrastructure, agile production, and distribution networks enable hospitals in emerging markets to catch up with their global peers. The company has distributed 45,000+ medical products to 1000+ healthcare facilities, saving 18,000+ lives across Nigeria, Ethiopia and Kenya. At LifeBank, we are the technology-led healthcare system for the future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Acquisition Agent

Job Location:&nbsp;Onipanu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Growth / Sales / Customer Acquisition
Reports to:&nbsp;Director, Customer Health &amp;Acquisition

Role Summary


	The Customer Acquisition Agent is responsible for identifying, engaging, and converting new healthcare facilities, hospitals, and clinics into active customers for LifeBank.
	The role focuses on expanding the company&rsquo;s customer base, driving revenue growth, and ensuring seamless onboarding of new accounts into LifeBank&rsquo;s healthcare logistics ecosystem.
	You will be the frontline growth driver, building trust with healthcare providers and positioning LifeBank as the preferred partner for medical supply and logistics solutions.


Key Responsibilities
Customer Acquisition &amp; Sales:


	Identify and prospect new hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, and healthcare facilities.
	Conduct cold calls, visits, and outreach to generate new business opportunities.
	Present LifeBank&rsquo;s services and value proposition to potential customers.
	Convert qualified leads into active paying customers.
	Achieve monthly and quarterly acquisition targets.


Field Engagement &amp; Relationship Building:


	Conduct on-site visits to healthcare facilities to understand their needs.
	Build strong relationships with decision-makers (doctors, procurement officers, administrators).
	Maintain consistent follow-up with prospects until conversion.
	Represent LifeBank professionally in all field interactions.


Onboarding &amp; Activation:


	Support new customers through onboarding and first-order activation.
	Ensure smooth handover to customer service and operations teams.
	Educate customers on ordering processes, platforms, and service standards.


Market Intelligence:


	Gather insights on competitor activity, pricing, and service gaps.
	Identify underserved areas and new market opportunities.
	Provide feedback to the growth and product teams on customer needs.


Reporting &amp; CRM Management:


	Maintain accurate records of leads, visits, and conversions in CRM tools.
	Submit daily/weekly reports on sales activities and pipeline progress.
	Track performance against acquisition targets.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Number of new customers acquired monthly
	Conversion rate from leads to active accounts
	Revenue generated from new accounts
	Number of successful field visits and engagements
	Customer onboarding success rate
	Pipeline size and growth


Key Requirements
Education &amp; Experience:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or equivalent in Business, Marketing, Health Sciences, or related field.
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in sales, customer acquisition, field marketing, or business development (healthcare or logistics is an advantage).


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong persuasion, negotiation, and communication skills.
	Comfortable with field work and frequent customer visits.
	Self-motivated and target-driven.
	Ability to build trust quickly with healthcare professionals.
	Basic CRM and digital tool proficiency.
	Strong resilience and ability to handle rejection.


What Success Looks Like:


	Consistent growth in new healthcare facilities signed on.
	Strong pipeline of qualified prospects across assigned regions.
	Smooth onboarding experience for new customers.
	Increased revenue contribution from new acquisitions.
	Strong presence of LifeBank across targeted healthcare networks.




Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 / Month.



Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;team@lifebank.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Customer Acquisition Agent Job at LifeBank




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

 


?LifeBank is a technology company that powers hospitals and care centers to deliver quality healthcare to patients in emerging markets. The company’s technology, infrastructure, agile production, and distribution networks enable hospitals in emerging markets to catch up with their global peers. The company has distributed 45,000+ medical products to 1000+ healthcare facilities, saving 18,000+ lives across Nigeria, Ethiopia and Kenya. At LifeBank, we are the technology-led healthcare system for the future.
We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Acquisition Agent

Job Location: Onipanu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Growth / Sales / Customer Acquisition
Reports to: Director, Customer Health &Acquisition

Role Summary

LifeBank is a technology company that powers hospitals and care centers to deliver quality healthcare to patients in emerging markets. The company’s technology, infrastructure, agile production, and distribution networks enable hospitals in emerging markets to catch up with their global peers. The company has distributed 45,000+ medical products to 1000+ healthcare facilities, saving 18,000+ lives across Nigeria, Ethiopia and Kenya. At LifeBank, we are the technology-led healthcare system for the future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Acquisition Agent

Job Location: Onipanu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Growth / Sales / Customer Acquisition
Reports to: Director, Customer Health &Acquisition

Role Summary


	The Customer Acquisition Agent is responsible for identifying, engaging, and converting new healthcare facilities, hospitals, and clinics into active customers for LifeBank.
	The role focuses on expanding the company’s customer base, driving revenue growth, and ensuring seamless onboarding of new accounts into LifeBank’s healthcare logistics ecosystem.
	You will be the frontline growth driver, building trust with healthcare providers and positioning LifeBank as the preferred partner for medical supply and logistics solutions.


Key Responsibilities
Customer Acquisition & Sales:


	Identify and prospect new hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, and healthcare facilities.
	Conduct cold calls, visits, and outreach to generate new business opportunities.
	Present LifeBank’s services and value proposition to potential customers.
	Convert qualified leads into active paying customers.
	Achieve monthly and quarterly acquisition targets.


Field Engagement & Relationship Building:


	Conduct on-site visits to healthcare facilities to understand their needs.
	Build strong relationships with decision-makers (doctors, procurement officers, administrators).
	Maintain consistent follow-up with prospects until conversion.
	Represent LifeBank professionally in all field interactions.


Onboarding & Activation:


	Support new customers through onboarding and first-order activation.
	Ensure smooth handover to customer service and operations teams.
	Educate customers on ordering processes, platforms, and service standards.


Market Intelligence:


	Gather insights on competitor activity, pricing, and service gaps.
	Identify underserved areas and new market opportunities.
	Provide feedback to the growth and product teams on customer needs.


Reporting & CRM Management:


	Maintain accurate records of leads, visits, and conversions in CRM tools.
	Submit daily/weekly reports on sales activities and pipeline progress.
	Track performance against acquisition targets.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Number of new customers acquired monthly
	Conversion rate from leads to active accounts
	Revenue generated from new accounts
	Number of successful field visits and engagements
	Customer onboarding success rate
	Pipeline size and growth


Key Requirements
Education & Experience:


	Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in Business, Marketing, Health Sciences, or related field.
	2–4 years of experience in sales, customer acquisition, field marketing, or business development (healthcare or logistics is an advantage).


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong persuasion, negotiation, and communication skills.
	Comfortable with field work and frequent customer visits.
	Self-motivated and target-driven.
	Ability to build trust quickly with healthcare professionals.
	Basic CRM and digital tool proficiency.
	Strong resilience and ability to handle rejection.


What Success Looks Like:


	Consistent growth in new healthcare facilities signed on.
	Strong pipeline of qualified prospects across assigned regions.
	Smooth onboarding experience for new customers.
	Increased revenue contribution from new acquisitions.
	Strong presence of LifeBank across targeted healthcare networks.




Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 / Month.



Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "LifeBank is a technology company that powers hospitals and care centers to deliver quality healthcare to patients in emerging markets. The company has distributed 45,000+ medical products to 1000+ healthcare facilities, saving 18,000+ lives across Nigeria, Ethiopia and Kenya. At LifeBank, we are the technology-led healthcare system for the future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Onipanu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: CEO

Role Summary


	The Finance Manager is responsible for managing the company&rsquo;s financial operations, ensuring accurate reporting, strong internal controls, statutory compliance, and effective cash flow management
	The role supports business growth by providing financial insights, budgeting discipline, and operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare monthly management accounts, financial statements, and variance analysis.
	Manage budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes.
	Oversee cash flow, working capital, payables, and receivables management.
	Ensure statutory compliance (taxes, pensions, regulatory filings, audits).
	Strengthen internal controls, policies, and financial governance.
	Coordinate audits and manage relationships with auditors and regulators.
	Provide financial analysis and decision support to leadership.
	Supervise and develop finance team members.


Key KPIs


	Accuracy and timeliness of financial reports
	Cash flow stability and forecast accuracy
	Compliance and audit outcomes
	Budget adherence and cost efficiency
	Process improvement and controls effectiveness


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	4 - 6 years of progressive finance or accounting experience.
	Strong knowledge of financial reporting, taxation, and compliance.
	Experience managing budgets, audits, and cash flow.
	Strong Excel and accounting system skills.
	High integrity, attention to detail, and analytical mindset.


Salary
NGN 500,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Resume to:&nbsp;eam@lifebank.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Finance Manager Job at LifeBank




        
    

        
        LifeBank is a technology company that powers hospitals and care centers to deliver quality healthcare to patients in emerging markets. The company’s technology, infrastructure, agile production, and distribution networks enable hospitals in emerging markets to catch up with their global peers. The company has distributed 45,000+ medical products to 1000+ healthcare facilities, saving 18,000+ lives across Nigeria, Ethiopia and Kenya. At LifeBank, we are the technology-led healthcare system for the future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location: Onipanu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: CEO

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Finance Manager is responsible for managing the company’s financial operations, ensuring accurate reporting, strong internal controls, statutory compliance, and effective cash flow management
	The role supports business growth by providing financial insights, budgeting discipline, and operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare monthly management accounts, financial statements, and variance analysis.
	Manage budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes.
	Oversee cash flow, working capital, payables, and receivables management.
	Ensure statutory compliance (taxes, pensions, regulatory filings, audits).
	Strengthen internal controls, policies, and financial governance.
	Coordinate audits and manage relationships with auditors and regulators.
	Provide financial analysis and decision support to leadership.
	Supervise and develop finance team members.


Key KPIs


	Accuracy and timeliness of financial reports
	Cash flow stability and forecast accuracy
	Compliance and audit outcomes
	Budget adherence and cost efficiency
	Process improvement and controls effectiveness


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	4 - 6 years of progressive finance or accounting experience.
	Strong knowledge of financial reporting, taxation, and compliance.
	Experience managing budgets, audits, and cash flow.
	Strong Excel and accounting system skills.
	High integrity, attention to detail, and analytical mindset.


Salary
NGN 500,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
